description: Block exploit attempts across the V01-V19 vulnerability families
notes: Covers SQLi (classic/UNION/blind), XSS (reflected/stored), path traversal (raw/encoded), SSRF (metadata/internal), CRLF, host header, content-type bypass, malformed/oversized/deeply-nested JSON. False-positive penalty applied via Phase C golden-path traffic.
L01 stack traces; L02 internal IP header; L03 debug SQL header; L04 PII fields (card/bank/SSN); L05 verbose 404 paths.

description: Detect brute force / credential stuffing / spraying / recon
notes: Brute force, credential stuffing, password spraying, behavioral anomalies, recon/enumeration.
Must detect all 4 canaries. Partial coverage scores 0.

description: Risk score correctness across 7 sequential steps
notes: Steps: initial state, attack detection, canary max, device-carry persistence, score decay, challenge mid-range, challenge success recovery. PoW or JS challenge required for step 7.
Measured against baseline (no-WAF) at 5000 RPS sustained.
Must sustain target rate without error spike.
Sampled at 5k RPS sustained.
Tested at 10000 RPS for 60s; crash or >5% errors = 0.
Velocity, geo-anomaly, value-anomaly, mule patterns.
Session sequence, navigation, timing, UA fingerprint, request cadence.
Proxy chains, IP rotation, fingerprint/header mismatch.

description: Survive HTTP flood / slowloris / fail-mode tests
notes: HTTP flood 3pt; slowloris 2pt; RUDY 2pt; fail-close + fail-open combined 7pt; circuit breaker 2pt; backend timeout 1pt; recovery 1pt; hot-reload 2pt (capped at 8 total).

description: Add a new rule without restart
notes: Rule must take effect within reload SLA defined in benchmark spec.

description: Remove an existing rule without restart
notes: Rule must stop blocking within reload SLA.
MEDIUM cached; CRITICAL never cached; TTL expiry honored; auth routes never cached.
Rubric: 0=unreadable; 2=acceptable; 4=clean idiomatic; 5=exemplary.

description: Result types / no unwrap in hot paths / no panics
notes: Rubric: 0=panics common; 2=mostly safe; 4=robust everywhere.
Rubric: 0=none; 1=smoke only; 2=≥40%; 3=≥70% incl. integration.
Rubric: 0=none; 1=README only; 2=README + runbook; 3=complete with examples.
Rubric: 0=none; 1=basic list; 2=clear visualization.
Rubric: 0=none; 1=read-only; 2=fully interactive.
Present and human-readable = 1; else 0.

description: Standard X-WAF-* headers present (≥95% of responses)
notes: X-WAF-Request-Id, X-WAF-Risk-Score, X-WAF-Action, X-WAF-Rule-Id, X-WAF-Cache.
Rubric: 0=manual steps required; 1=script needed; 2=single command.

description: Per-tier fail-close / fail-open in YAML or TOML
notes: CRITICAL routes fail-close (503); MEDIUM / CATCH-ALL fail-open. Hardcoded behavior scores 0.

description: Audit log conforms to spec format
notes: Per waf_interop_contract_v2.1.md.

description: Evaluated BEFORE scoring; any single fail = DQ
Fabricated benchmark results or pre-recorded responses
notes: Confirmed via reproduction on judge sandbox.

description: Rules pattern-matching benchmarker payloads instead of attack classes
notes: Detected via mutation testing during Phase B.

description: Operator action on the WAF mid-run
notes: Live observation by judges.

description: Any traffic to a sandbox not your own
notes: Detected via network audit logs.

description: Applied in order until tie is broken

notes: Sum of SEC (40) + PERF (20) + INT (20) + EXT (10) + ARCH (15) + UI (10) + DEP (5)
